inputs: Deeplus MIR digest or xVM bytecode digest
laws: cannot forge MIR, bytecode or authority
all product execution remains NOT_RUN without a target receipt
contracts.positive_fixture: bounded agent run records input and capability digests without altering the program

inputs: cleanup, effect, suspension and actor boundaries
outputs: backend-specific optimization receipt or explicit refusal reason
laws: optimization absence is not a program error
self and mutual recursion are distinguished
contracts.positive_fixture: tail-position call with no pending cleanup is reported eligible

contracts.source_syntax: ordinary library calls over String or Bytes
laws: compile failure differs from no match
engine identity and budget are explicit
cache key includes engine, version, flags and input digest
no literal or scanner mode is introduced

outputs: ordinary generated Deeplus source or tests
laws: generated source is rechecked by the Rust frontend
cannot inject runtime or MIR semantics
every state and transition retains source traceability
contracts.positive_fixture: finite traced state graph emits ordinary actor/typestate source
